title: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes
summary: Introduced the Variational Autoencoder (VAE), a framework for learning latent representations by combining neural network encoders/decoders with variational Bayesian inference. The reparameterization trick made it possible to backpropagate through stochastic sampling, enabling end-to-end training of generative models with principled probabilistic foundations.
key_contributions: Introduced the VAE framework combining variational inference with neural networks
The reparameterization trick enabled backpropagation through stochastic nodes
Provided a principled probabilistic framework for generative modeling
Established the encoder-decoder paradigm for learning meaningful latent spaces
impact: VAEs established a principled framework for deep generative models that predated and complemented GANs. The latent space concept became central to image generation, drug discovery, and representation learning. VAEs are a direct ancestor of latent diffusion models like Stable Diffusion.
